Operation 'ListApplications' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Original summary is too generic. Description lacks details about what query parameters are supported, what filtering/sorting options exist, and what the response structure contains. Enhanced version clarifies pagination support and return value structure for better AI agent decision-making.

data.current_description: Get applications that match the given query with pagination.
data.summary_suggestion: List applications with query and pagination
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a paginated list of applications matching the provided query parameters. Supports filtering and sorting options. Returns an array of Application objects with pagination metadata including total count and page information.
data.reasoning: Original summary is too generic. Description lacks details about what query parameters are supported, what filtering/sorting options exist, and what the response structure contains. Enhanced version clarifies pagination support and return value structure for better AI agent decision-making.

message: Operation 'CreateApplication' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Summary is acceptable but description is too vague. Missing details about authentication requirements, what fields are required vs optional, what the response contains, and that the application is immediately available. Enhanced description helps AI agents understand prerequisites and outcomes.

data.current_description: Create a new application with the given data.
data.description_suggestion: Creates a new application with the provided configuration data from the request body. Requires authentication. The request must include required fields as specified in CreateApplicationRequest schema. Returns the newly created Application object with a generated ID and default settings. The application is immediately available for use.
data.reasoning: Summary is acceptable but description is too vague. Missing details about authentication requirements, what fields are required vs optional, what the response contains, and that the application is immediately available. Enhanced description helps AI agents understand prerequisites and outcomes.

message: Operation 'GetApplication' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_output_details. Summary is too generic. Description lacks information about what fields are returned and error handling. Enhanced version clarifies the complete response structure and error scenarios for better AI agent understanding.

data.description_suggestion: Retrieves detailed information for a specific application identified by its ID. Returns the complete Application object including all configuration properties, settings, and metadata. Returns 404 if the application ID does not exist.
data.reasoning: Summary is too generic. Description lacks information about what fields are returned and error handling. Enhanced version clarifies the complete response structure and error scenarios for better AI agent understanding.

message: Operation 'UpdateApplication' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Summary is too generic. Description lacks critical details about partial update support, what fields can be updated, and when changes take effect. Enhanced version clarifies update semantics and immediate effect for AI agents to understand the operation's behavior.

data.description_suggestion: Updates an existing application's configuration using the provided fields in the request body. Supports partial updates - only provided fields in UpdateApplicationRequest will be modified. Returns the updated Application object with all current properties. Changes take effect immediately.
data.reasoning: Summary is too generic. Description lacks critical details about partial update support, what fields can be updated, and when changes take effect. Enhanced version clarifies update semantics and immediate effect for AI agents to understand the operation's behavior.

message: Operation 'DeleteApplication' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Summary is acceptable but description lacks critical information about permanence, what gets deleted, response status code, and error handling. Enhanced version emphasizes irreversibility and scope of deletion to help AI agents understand the destructive nature of this operation.

data.description_suggestion: Permanently deletes an application and all associated data by its ID. This action cannot be undone. Returns 204 No Content on successful deletion. Returns 404 if the application ID does not exist. All related configurations and settings are removed.
data.reasoning: Summary is acceptable but description lacks critical information about permanence, what gets deleted, response status code, and error handling. Enhanced version emphasizes irreversibility and scope of deletion to help AI agents understand the destructive nature of this operation.
